action.reasoning: Observation: Best bal_acc still 0.5657 (iter2 CLIP-ViT); recent runs hit val_bal~0.87 but test ~0.55 with high variance on rare classes (bird 0.07-0.85, squirrel 0.03-0.12). Training curves show steady source-domain convergence but persistent train-val vs test gap. Analysis: Strong domain shift (lighting/backgrounds/species) not addressed by current augs/regularization; sampler+label_smoothing helps val but rare-class instability persists on L100. Focal loss should upweight hard examples (often rare/shifted), extra camera-specific augs (blur/grayscale) improve robustness without hurting common classes. Decision: Add FocalLoss(gamma=2.0), GaussianBlur+RandomGrayscale to train transforms, drop_rate=0.15, epochs=15 (to fit ~57min remaining), remove label_smoothing; keep sampler+RandAugment+val_bal selection+TTA. Submit eval immediately after training to measure improvement within time/iter budget.
